indicators.name: Large desk
indicators.rationale: A large desk provides ample space for a computer and other work materials.

indicators.name: Good lighting
indicators.rationale: The floor lamp provides focused light on the desk area, reducing eye strain.

indicators.name: Cabinets
indicators.rationale: Cabinets offer storage for office supplies and personal items, keeping the workspace organized.

reasoning_summary: The scene is well-suited for computer work (Solo) with a large desk, good lighting, and ample storage.
